story: For a week, Jonathan has called his father Bill and reached only voicemail. He asks Uncle Jack to check the house, calls hospitals, and files a missing-person report. His messages turn from worried to furious because he also needs advice about Eileen leaving. Meanwhile, Bill is in Aruba with a new friend, Charlotte. His phone has been off. After another unanswered call, Jonathan is still trying to figure out what to do about his father.
implausible_knowledge: Meanwhile, Bill is in Aruba with a new friend, Charlotte. His phone has been off.
question: What will Jonathan most plausibly do next about Bill?
answer_with_knowledge: Stop the search and wait for Bill to get back to him after his Aruba trip.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep calling, following up on leads, and pressing others to help look for him.
